user_message: Give me the team portfolio triage for this Monday. I need to know what my reports should be focusing on -- any fires, any big meetings, any pipeline stuff that needs attention this week.

top_priority_accounts.issue: ACR declined 18% MoM; contract renewal in 60 days
Escalation email received Friday; customer threatening to leave
$450K opportunity close date is this Friday; stage still in Develop
New SPA signal -- deployment blockers on Azure Arc
QBR prep needed by Wednesday; no brief started

tagged_priorities_last_week: Follow up on Trey Research escalation path
Push Ahmed on Proseware close plan
Check if Sarah needs DSSP support on Relecloud

usability_anchors: Score 5: Top 5-8 accounts ranked by urgency x impact; VanArsdel and Trey Research at top (red health + time pressure); each has specific named next-action with IC owner; time-block plan maps to manager's actual calendar (e.g., 'discuss VanArsdel with Marcus in Tuesday 1:1')
Score 3: Correct accounts surfaced but ranking is off (e.g., Wingtip QBR ranked above Trey escalation) or next-actions are generic
Score 1: Lists 30+ accounts without prioritization or gives identical treatment to red and green accounts
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Each priority references specific data (ACR trend percentages, close dates, health flags, SPA signals); acknowledges last week's tagged priorities and shows continuity
Score 3: Uses correct data but doesn't reference last week's priorities or misses one key signal
Score 1: Generic reasoning not tied to specific data points
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correctly identifies multi-factor urgency (VanArsdel: ACR decline + renewal proximity + red health; Proseware: close date Friday + stage mismatch); handoff queue populated for stale records and meeting prep
Score 3: Identifies top risks but uses single factor (e.g., ranks by ACR alone or by health flag alone)
Score 1: No multi-factor prioritization; lists accounts alphabetically or by portfolio size

guardrail_checks: Must use multi-factor prioritization (not ACR alone)
Must limit to 5-10 accounts (not dump entire portfolio)
Must include named owner per action item
Must acknowledge prior week tagged priorities
